rag_rules: Generate guarantees relating visible output features to visible input features in component type annexes.
Use only identifiers explicitly present in the AADL model as visible symbols in AGREE expressions.
generic_rules: Contracts in component type annexes must reference only ports or constants declared in the same scope.
Equations and constants must use AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Helper expressions must be declared with eq name : type = expression;
AGREE annexes must be wrapped in annex agree {** ... **};
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent paths or implementation-only bindings in component type annexes.
